alt: Kakapo named Trevor feeding on ripe yellow poroporo fruit in the forest
caption: Strictly herbivorous, kakapo thrive on native fruits, seeds, roots, and especially the fruit of the rimu tree.
acquisitionNotes: Fantastic rare feeding behavior shot showing diet in natural ecosystem. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/b/b7/Kakapo_Trevor_feeding_on_poroporo_fruit.jpg
attributionText: Photo by Department of Conservation via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY 2.0
